---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a false positive, crash, or incorrect behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## URL tested (if applicable)

```
https://example.com
```

## Command run

```bash
site-audit audit https://example.com --mode html
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the CLI output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node.js: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- site-audit version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Playwright installed: [yes/no]
